title: Add feature_importances_ accessor to every tree-based estimator
description:
Critical sklearn API. Returns Array1<F> of length n_features summing to 1.0, where each entry is the normalized total impurity decrease attributable to splits on that feature.

For single trees: walk every internal node, accumulate (n_samples_at_node / n_total_samples) * impurity_decrease into the splitting feature's bucket, then normalize.

For ensembles: average the feature_importances_ of all base estimators (RF, ExtraTrees, GB, HGB, Bagging) or weighted average (AdaBoost). VotingClassifier doesn't define one in sklearn — skip.

Affected: every estimator except IsolationForest, RandomTreesEmbedding (no clear semantic).
